element.description: Interior wall elevation showing full-height ceramic tile from floor to a mirror strip near the top; overall wall height 2.70 m, tile/fixture zone height 2.00 m (sub-split 0.60 lower + 0.20 + 0.20 grout/coursing lines + 1.00 mirror strip near ceiling, reading bottom to top)

Wall-hung wash basin below the mirror

Hand-held shower head (SW.) with hose, right side of elevation, in the อาบน้ำ (shower) zone

Circled callouts '2' (top) and '3' (left, mid-height) mark tile-material or section-reference points, matching the same numbering seen on the WC.1 plan (หน้า11)

warnings: This sheet (A-10) was never extracted in mk_test/t1 or t2 — first-time read. It shows two interior wall elevations/sections of the WC.1 bathroom (labelled '1' and '2' at the bottom, matching the sectioning arrows on the plan sheet หน้า11); kept as two sibling files since each is a distinct elevation view — this file covers view '1' (left elevation, spanning the WC.1 and อาบน้ำ zones). View '2' (right elevation, showing the window wall) is in _หน้า12_wc1_section2.json.
The overall 2.45 m width dimension chain and 0.48/0.50 m level markers match exactly what was read independently on the plan sheet (หน้า11_wc1_plan.json) — cross-consistent.
Fine tile-coursing sub-dimensions (0.60/0.20/0.20/1.00 breakdown of the 2.00 m zone) are small print and only medium confidence; flagged for zoom review.

Title block sheet name is inferred as 'แบบขยายห้องน้ำ WC.1' (bottom title reads 'แบบขยายห้องน้ำ WC.1', matching the sheet index label for A-10) — the individual view captions on the sheet itself just read 'รูปตัดห้องน้ำ WC.1' with a small circled '1' or '2', 1:25 scale.
